You Dashboards People Events
Subscribe
Alerts & notifications
Critical — act now
HOME-ARP comment window is live — closes May 26, 2026. COS is collecting public comment on the HOME-ARP Allocation Plan amendment via an ArcGIS Survey123 form Esri's own ACR rates as "Partially Supports" on WCAG 2.1 A/AA. A WCAG 2.1 AA Drupal Webform replacement is ready to install — bilingual EN/ES, JSON webhook + staff email + native storage, inline accommodation intake.
24 CFR 91.105 · ADA Title II · May 4, 2026
Open the HOME-ARP bundle →
Downtown Funding and Records Search Search BID assessments, DDA grants, TIF reimbursements, board meetings, and financial records in one place.
Annual adopted budget — C.R.S. 29-1-101 et seq · April 10, 2026
Open the search portal →
ADA Title II deadline: April 24, 2026 — 16 days. All local government websites must meet WCAG 2.1 AA. Zero district sites are confirmed compliant on PDF documents.
HB21-1110 · 28 C.F.R. Part 35 · April 8, 2026
Open district audit dashboard →
249 of 284 metro districts have no website. CORA request is the only way a resident can access their own district's records.
EPC Assessor audit · April 2026
See district audit →
WS Districts (WSDM) serves 30+ districts on a single WordPress site. Last calendar entry: 2021. No governance docs. No financials. One compliance letter fixes all 30+ simultaneously.
Platform audit · April 2026
Draft compliance letter →
High priority
All posted PDFs likely fail WCAG 1.3.1. Meeting minutes, budgets, and audit docs are almost certainly untagged. This is the real HB21-1110 failure — not the homepage.
ADA document audit · April 2026
View ADA analysis →
0 of 8 audited sites post their service plan. C.R.S. §32-1-202 requires it. This is the foundational legal document. Not one district links it publicly.
Governance gap · §32-1-202
See audit dashboard →
Annual audit documents: publicly posted by 0 of 8 districts. Required by §32-1-106. Due to State Auditor by July 31. The clock is running.
Governance gap · §32-1-106 · due July 31
See audit dashboard →
Informational
2 CORA requests pending response. Military housing numbers and district governance records both awaiting reply. Response window is still open.
CORA tracker · April 2026
View tracker →
Wolfersberger compliance and Bellamese analysis complete. New findings ready for review on developer agreements, compliance history, and parcel-level records.
Compliance analysis · April 2026
Read analysis →
Jurisdiction finder is live. Enter any El Paso County address to find your metro districts, school district, city jurisdiction, and utilities — plain language, no login.
New · April 2026
Find my jurisdiction →
CSPD Blotter — Weekly History is live. 271 incidents pulled directly from the live blotter feed, paired with a Poisson 95% confidence band to flag statistical anomalies week to week. Tabs are full APG-pattern keyboard accessible; every chart has an aria-label.
New · April 2026 · WCAG 2.1 AA
Open blotter dashboard →
Lorson Ranch financial dashboard is live. Seven cross-pledged metro districts, $94.2M aggregate audited deficit, IGA money flows, and a per-home tax calculator — sourced from 2026 budgets and 2024 audits. Companion plain-language briefing available as a download.
New · Special Districts · April 2026
Open Lorson Ranch dashboard →
CBI Missing Persons form — accessible rebuild is live. Resolves all seven critical/serious findings from the ADA audit: skip link, live regions, focus management, EN/ES localization, real-time validation messaging. Drops into the existing Drupal Webform infrastructure with optional Claude API routing.
New · State · April 2026 · WCAG 2.1 AA
Open CBI form rebuild →
LexisNexis ADAM Program dashboard — accessible rebuild is live. Audit and reference rebuild of the missing-children dashboard: APG-pattern tabs with roving tabindex and full keyboard nav, solid amber focus rings (3:1 against any surface), darker success-green for AA contrast, and "View Poster" placeholders converted from dead anchors to real buttons.
New · Private Sector · April 2026 · WCAG 2.1 AA
Open ADAM dashboard →
EDARP — Active Projects BOCC Meeting Calendar EPC Planning Dept
ADA accommodations: ADACompliance@elpasoco.com
El Paso County, Colorado Land Development Code 2024–2026 Update · Clarion Associates

⚑ Window Open Public comment is open now — LDC adoption expected spring 2026 Submit Comment ↗

Contact

Get in touch.
We read everything.

Questions about the LDC, requests for accommodation, accessibility reports, or anything else — here's who to contact and what to include so we can respond quickly.

📋
Primary Contact
General LDC Questions & Public Comment

Questions about the LDC update process, document drafts, upcoming events, or how to submit public comment. This is the main planning team inbox for the project.

✉
Email
plnweb@elpasoco.com
☎
Phone
719-520-6300
📍
Office
2880 International Circle, Suite 110
Colorado Springs, CO 80910
What to include for faster response
  • The specific section of the draft you're asking about (e.g., "Section 7.2.1 — Sketch Plan Criteria")
  • Your name and address, so we can confirm jurisdiction and follow up
  • Whether you're requesting a comment acknowledgment or a substantive response
  • If attending a hearing, the file number and meeting date
⚖️
Official Record
Submit Written Comment for Hearings

To submit written comment that enters the official administrative record for Planning Commission or BOCC hearings, use the hearings email. Written comments carry the same legal weight as speaking in person and must be submitted at least 24 hours before the scheduled hearing.

✉
Hearings Email
PCDHearings@ElPasoCO.com
Required in every hearing comment
  • File number or project name (for LDC: reference the specific module or section)
  • Your full name and mailing address
  • Your position: support, oppose, or neutral with conditions
  • The specific criteria you're addressing (master plan reference, code section)
  • Submit at least 24 hours before the hearing date
♿
ADA · Accessibility
Accommodations & Accessibility Reports

To request an accommodation for a meeting or event, contact the ADA Coordinator at least 48 hours in advance. To report inaccessible technology, broken links, or accessibility failures on this website or the Konveio comment platform, use the contacts below.

✉
ADA Coordinator — Accommodations
ADACompliance@elpasoco.com
☎
ADA Coordinator Phone
719-520-6866
✉
Website & Technology Issues
plnweb@elpasoco.com · 719-520-6300

For a full statement of this site's accessibility status, known limitations, and remediation efforts, see our Accessibility Statement.

🗳️
Direct Representation
Contact Your Commissioner

For the LDC adoption vote, your most direct leverage point is your elected commissioner. Contact them before the vote — not after. Two sentences and your address is enough. They read constituent contact.

🏛
Find your commissioner
bocc.elpasoco.com ↗
Enter your address to find your district and commissioner's direct contact.
What to say in two sentences
  • State your name, address, and that you're a constituent in their district
  • Reference a specific LDC section or standard you care about
  • State what you want them to do: require X, strengthen Y, clarify Z
  • Specific asks are more actionable than general support or opposition

Planning Department Office

El Paso County Planning & Community Development 2880 International Circle
Suite 110
Colorado Springs, CO 80910
Monday8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Tuesday8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Wednesday8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Thursday8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Friday8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
HolidaysClosed

Find your commissioner
Enter your address at bocc.elpasoco.com to find which district you're in and your commissioner's direct contact information.
bocc.elpasoco.com ↗
Join the Mailing List
Get notified when new draft modules are published, events are scheduled, and the adoption hearing is set.

Your email will only be used for LDC update notifications. You can unsubscribe at any time by emailing plnweb@elpasoco.com.

♿ Accommodation Request

Need help participating?

Anyone who requires an accommodation for effective communication or participation in a county program, service, or activity should contact the ADA Coordinator at least 48 hours before the scheduled event. Language assistance is also available on request.

ADACompliance@elpasoco.com 719-520-6866
El Paso County LDC Update
Land Development Code · 2024–2026

Public comment is open through adoption in spring 2026. Contact plnweb@elpasoco.com with questions or to request an accessible format of any document.

Accessibility Contact Privacy ↗

Get email updates

We'll email you a plain-language summary with links to the source documents whenever this office posts new public-record material.

By subscribing you agree to receive emails about this topic. We'll send a confirmation link first. Unsubscribe any time. (consent v2026-04-30-v1)
